block.header: natuswobiku unakamigata no oki tu su ni pune pa todomemu saywo pukenikyeri
kadusika no mama no uramwi wo kogu pune no punabito sawaku nami tatu rasi mo
tukupane no nipigupamaywo no kinu pa aredo kimi ga mikyesi si ayani ki posi mo
taratineno nipigupamaywo no kinu pa aredo kimi ga mikyesi si amata ki posi mo
tukupane ni yuki ka mo puraru inawokamo kanasiki kworo ga ninwo posaru ka mo
sinanwo n aru suga no arano ni pototogisu naku kowe kikeba toki suginikyeri
aratamano kipe no payasi ni na wo tatete yukikatu masizi i wo sakidatane
kipepito no madarabusuma ni wata sapada irinamasi mono imo ga wodoko ni
amanopara puzi no sibayama ko no kure no toki yuturinaba apazu ka mo aramu

sentence.transcription: apa zu ka mo ara mu

block.header: puzinone no iya toponagaki yamadi wo mo imogari to peba ke ni yobazu kinu

sentence.transcription: ke ni yoba zu ki nu

block.header: kasumi wiru puzinoyamabwi ni wa ga kinaba iduti mukite ka imo ga nagekamu
sanuraku pa tama no wo bakari kwopuraku pa puzinotakane no naru sapa no goto
makanasimi nuraku pa sikyeraku sanaraku pa idu no takane no naru sapa nasu yo
apyeraku pa tama no wo sikye ya kwopuraku pa puzinotakane ni puru yuki nasu mo
suruga no umi osipye ni opuru pamatudura imasi wo tanomi papa ni tagapinu
suruga no umi osipye ni opuru pamatudura imasi wo tanomi oya ni tagapinu
idu no umi ni tatu siranami no aritutu mo tuginamu monowo midaresimeme ya
sirakumo no tayetutu mo tugamu to mope ya midaresomekyemu
asigara no wotemo konomo ni sasu wana no kanarumasidumi koro are pimo toku
sagamune no womine mikakusi wasurekuru imo ga na ywobite a wo ne si naku na

sentence.transcription: a wo ne si naku na

block.header: muzasine no womine mikakusi wasureyuku kimi ga na kakete a wo ne si nakuru
wa ga sekwo wo yamato pye yarite matu sida su asigarayama no sugwi no konoma ka

sentence.transcription: sugwi no ko no ma ka

block.header: asigara no pakwone no yama ni apa makite mwi to pa nareru wo apanaku mo ayasi

sentence.transcription: mwi to pa nar eru wo

block.header: asigara no pakwone no yama ni papukuduno pikaba yorikone sita naponaponi
kamakura no migwosinosaki no ipakuye no kimi ga kuyu beki kokoro pa motazi
makanasimi sane ni wa pa yuku kamakura no minanosegapa ni sipo mitu namu ka

sentence.transcription: sa ne ni wa pa yuku

block.header: momotusima asigarawobune aruki opomi me koso karu rame kokoro pa mopedo
asigari no twopi no kaputi ni iduru yu no yo ni mo tayworani kworo ga ipanaku ni

sentence.transcription: kwo ro ga ipa naku ni

block.header: asigari no mama no kwosuge no sugamakura aze ka makasamu koro se tamakura
asigari no pakwone no nero no nikwogusa no panatuduma nare ya pimo tokazu nemu
asigara no misaka kasikwomi kumoriywono a ga sitabape wo kotideturu kamo
sagamudi no yorogi no pama no managwo nasu kwora pa kanasiku omoparuru kamo
tamagapa ni sarasu tedukuri sarasarani nani so ko no kwo no kokoda kanasiki

sentence.transcription: nani so ko no kwo no

block.header: muzasinwo ni urapye katayaki masadeni mo noranu kimi ga na ura n idenikyeri
muzasinwo no wogukwi ga kigisi tatiwakare inisi yopi ywori sero ni apanapu yo

sentence.transcription: se ro ni apa napu yo

block.header: kwopwisikyeba swode mo puramu wo muzasinwo no ukyera ga pana no iro n idu na yume
ikanisite kwopwiba ka imo ni muzasinwo no ukyera ga pana no iro n idezu aramu

sentence.transcription: iro n ide zu ara mu

block.header: muzasinwo no kusapa moromuki ka mo kaku mo kimi ga manima ni a pa yorinisi wo

sentence.transcription: a pa yori ni si wo

block.header: irimadi no opoya ga para no ipawitura pikaba nurunuru wa ni na taye sone
wa ga sekwo wo ado ka mo ipamu muzasinwo no ukyera ga pana no toki naki monowo
sakitama no tu ni woru pune no kaze wo itami tuna pa tayu tomo koto na taye sone
natuswobiku unapi wo sasite tobu tori no itaramu to so yo a ga sitapapesi
umaguta no nero no sasapa no tuyusimo no nurete wa kinaba na pa kwopuba so mo

sentence.transcription: ne ro no sasa pa no

block.header: umaguta no nero ni kakuriwi kaku dani mo kuni no topokaba na ga me pori semu

sentence.transcription: na ga me pori se mu

block.header: kadusika no mama no tegwona wo makoto ka mo ware ni yosu to pu mama no tegwona wo
kadusika no mama no tegwona ga arisikaba mama no osupi ni nami mo todoroni
nipodorino kadusikawase wo nipe su tomo so no kanasiki wo two ni tateme ya mo

sentence.transcription: two ni tate me ya mo

block.header: a no oto sezu yukamu kwoma moga kadusika no mama no tugipasi yamazu kaywopamu
tukupane no nero ni kasumi wi sugwikateni ikiduku kimi wo winete yarasane
imo ga kadwo iya toposokinu tukupayama kakurenu potwo ni swode pa puritena
tukupane ni kakanaku wasi no ne nomwi wo ka nakiwatarinamu apu to pa nasi ni

sentence.transcription: apu to pa na si ni

block.header: tukupane ni sogapi ni miyuru asipoyama asikaru toga mo sane miyenaku ni
tukupane no ipa mo todoroni oturu midu yo ni mo tayurani wa ga omopanaku ni
tukupane no wotemo konomo ni moribye suwe papa i moredomo tama so apinikyeru
sagoromono wodukupanero no yama no saki wasurakoba kwoso na wo kakyenapamye
wodukupa no nero ni tuku tasi apidaywo pa sapada narinwo wo mata netemu kamo
wodukupa no sikeki konoma ywo tatu tori no me yu ka na wo mimu sanezaranaku ni

sentence.transcription: sike ki ko no ma ywo
me yu ka na wo mi mu

block.header: pitati n aru nasaka no umi no tamamo koso pikeba taye sure ado ka taye semu
pito mwina no koto pa tayu tomo panisina no isiwi no tegwo ga koto na taye sone
sinanwodi pa ima no parimiti karibane ni asi pumasinamu kutu pake wa ga se
sinanwo n aru tiguma no kapa no sazaresi mo kimi si pumiteba tama to piropamu
nakamana ni uki woru pune no kogidenaba apu koto katasi kyepu ni si arazupa
pinogure ni usupi no yama wo kwoyuru pi pa sena no ga swode mo sayani purasitu

sentence.transcription: se na no ga swode mo

block.header: a ga kwopwi pa masaka mo kanasi kusamakura tagwo no irinwo no oku mo kanasi mo
kamitukenwo aswo no maswomura kakimudaki nuredo akanu wo ado ka a ga semu

sentence.transcription: ado ka a ga se mu

block.header: kamitukenwo wodwo no tadori ga kapadi ni mo kwora pa apanamo pitori nomwi site
kamitukenwo wo no tadori ga apadi ni mo sena pa apanamo miru pito nasi ni
kamitukenwo sanwo no kukutati woripayasi are pa matamu we kotosi kozu tomo
kamitukenwo magupasimadwo ni asapi sasi makirapasi mo na aritutu mireba
nipitayama ne ni pa tukanana wa ni yosori pasinaru kwora si ayani kanasi mo
ikaporo ni amakumo itugi kanumaduku pito to otapapu iza nesime twora
ikaporo no swopi no paripara nemokoroni oku wo na kane so masaka si yokaba
tagwo no ne ni yosetuna papete yosuredomo ani ku ya sidusi so no kapo yoki ni

sentence.transcription: so no kapo yo ki ni

block.header: kamitukyenwo kurwopo no nero no kuzupagata kanasikye kwora ni iyazakariku mo
twonegapa no kapase mo sirazu tada watari nami ni apu nosu apyeru kimi kamo
ikaporo no yasaka no wide ni tatu nwozi no araparwo made mo sane wo saneteba

sentence.transcription: sa ne wo sa ne teba

block.header: kamitukenwo ikapo no numa ni uwekwonagwi kaku kwopwimu to ya tane motomekyemu
kamitukenwo kapoya ga numa no ipawitura pikaba nuretutu a wo na taye sone
kamitukenwo inara no numa no opowigusa yoso ni misi ywo pa ima koso masare

sentence.transcription: yoso ni mi si ywo pa

block.header: kamitukenwo sanwoda no nape no muranape ni koto pa sadametu ima pa ikani semo

sentence.transcription: ima pa ika ni se mo

block.header: ikapo se ywo 奈可中次下 omopitworo kuma koso situ to wasure senapu mo
kamitukenwo sanwo no punapasi toripanasi oya pa sakuredo wa pa sakaru gape
ikapone ni kamwi na nari sone wa ga pe ni pa yuwe pa nakyedomo kwora ni yorite so
ikapokaze puku pi pukanu pi ari to ipedo a ga kwopwi nomwi si toki nakarikyeri
kamitukenwo ikapo no nero ni purwo yoki no yukisugwikatenu imo ga ipye no atari
simotukyenwo mikamonoyama no konara nosu magupasi kworo pa ta ga kye ka motamu

sentence.transcription: ta ga kye ka mota mu

block.header: simotukyenwo aswo no kapara ywo isi pumazu swora yu to kinu yo na ga kokoro nore

sentence.transcription: swora yu to ki nu yo

block.header: apidune no kuni wo sadopomi apanapaba sinwopi ni semo to pimo musubasane
tukusi n aru nipopu kwo yuweni mitinoku no katworiwotomye no yupisi pimo toku
adatara no ne ni pusu sisi no aritutu mo are pa itaramu nedwo na sari sone
topotu apumi inasa posoye no miwotukusi are wo tanomete asamasi monowo
sida no ura wo asa kogu pune pa yosi nasi ni kogu rame kamo yo yosi kos aru rame
asigari no akinanoyama ni pikwo pune no siri pikasi mo yo kokoba kwogatani
asigari no wawokakyeyama no kadu no kwi no wa wo kadusane mo kadusakazu tomo
takigwikoru kamakurayama no kodaru kwi wo matu to na ga ipaba kwopwitutu ya aramu
kamitukyenwo aswoyamatudura nwo wo piromi papinisi monowo aze ka taye semu
ikaporo no swopi no paripara wa ga kinu ni tukiyorasi mo yo pitapye to omopyeba
siratopopu wonipitayama no moru yama no uragare senana tokopa ni moga mo
mitinoku no adatara mayumi pazikiokite serasimyekinaba tura pakamye kamo
tumuganwo ni suzu ga oto kikoyu kamusida no tono no nakati si togari su rasi mo
mituganwo ni suzu ga oto kikoyu kamusida no tono no wakugwo si togari su rasi mo
suzuganeno payuma umaya no tutumiwi no midu wo tamapena imo ga tadate ywo
ko no kapa ni asana arapu kwo nare mo are mo yoti wo so moteru ide kwo tabari ni
ko no kapa ni asana arapu kwo masi mo are mo yoti wo so moteru ide kwo tabari ni
matopoku no kumowi ni miyuru imo ga pye ni itu ka itaramu ayumye a ga kwoma
topoku site kumowi ni miyuru imo ga pye ni itu ka itaramu ayumye kurokwoma
adumadi no tegwonoywobisaka kwoyeganete yama ni kanemu mo yadori pa nasi ni
ura mo naku wa ga yuku miti ni awoyagwi no parite tatereba monomopidutu mo
kipatuku no woka no kukumira ware tumedo kwo ni mo mitanapu sena to tumasane
minatwo no asi ga naka n aru tamakwosuge kariko wa ga sekwo toko no pyedasi ni
imonaro ga tukapu kapadu no sasarawogwi asi to pitogoto katariyorasi mo
kusakage no anwo na yukamu to parisi miti anwo pa yukazute arakusa datinu
panadirapu ko no mukatuwo no wona no wo no pizi ni tuku made kimi ga yo moga mo

sentence.transcription: ko no muka tu wo no

block.header: sirwotapeno koromo no swode wo makuraga ywo ama kogiku miyu nami tatu na yume
wokusawo to wogusazukyewo to sipopune no narabyete mireba wogusa kati myeri
sanatura no woka ni apa maki kanasiki ga kwoma pa tagu tomo wa pa swo to mo pazi

sentence.transcription: wa pa swo to mo pazi

block.header: omosirwoki nwo woba na yaki so purukusa ni nipikusa maziri opwi pa opuru gani
kaze no to no topoki wagimo ga kisesi kinu tamoto no kudari maywopikinikyeri
nipa ni tatu asatekwobusuma koyopi dani tuma yosikosene asatekwobusuma
kwopwisikyeba kimase wa ga sekwo kakituyagwi ure tumikarasi ware tatimatamu
utusemi no yaswokotonopye pa sikeku tomo araswopikanete a wo kotonasu na

sentence.transcription: ya swo koto no pye pa

block.header: utipisasu miya no wa ga se pa yamatomye no piza maku gotoni a wo wasurasu na

sentence.transcription: miya no wa ga se pa

block.header: nase no kwo ya tori no wokadi si nakada wore a wo ne si naku yo ikuduku madeni

sentence.transcription: a wo ne si naku yo

block.header: ine tukeba kakaru a ga te wo koyopi mo ka tono no wakugwo ga torite nagekamu
tare so ko no ya no two osoburu nipunamwi ni wa ga se wo yarite ipapu ko no two wo
aze to ipye ka sane ni apanaku ni mapi kurete yopi na pa konani akyenu sida kuru

sentence.transcription: sa ne ni apa naku ni

block.header: asipikwino yamasapabito no pito sapani mana to ipu kwo ga ayani kanasisa
matopoku no nwo ni mo apanamu kokoro naku satwo no minaka ni apyeru sena kamo
pitogoto no sikeki ni yorite mawogomo no oyazi makura pa wa pa makazi ya mo
komanisiki pimo tokisakete nuru gapeni ado sero to ka mo ayani kanasiki
makanasimi nureba koto n idu sanenapeba kokoro no woro ni norite kanasi mo
okuyama no makwi no itatwo wo todoto site wa ga pirakamu ni irikite nasane
yamadori no woro no patuwo ni kagami kakye twonapu bemi koso na ni yosorikyeme
yupuke ni mo koyopi to norarwo wa ga sena pa aze so mo koyopi yosi ro kimasanu
apimite pa titose ya inuru inawokamo are ya sika mopu kimi matigateni
simaraku pa netutu mo aramu wo ime nomwi ni motona miyetutu a wo ne si nakuru
pitoduma to aze ka so wo ipamu sikaraba ka twonari no kinu wo karite kinapamo

sentence.transcription: aze ka so wo ipa mu

block.header: sanwoyama ni utu ya wonoto no topokadomo nemo to ka kworo ga omo ni miyeturu

sentence.transcription: ne mo to ka kwo ro ga

block.header: uwedake no moto sape toyomi idete inaba idusi mukite ka imo ga nagekamu
kwopwitutu mo woramu to suredo yupumayama kakuresi kimi wo omopikanetu mo
ube kwona pa wanu ni kwopu namo tatwo tuku no nwoganapyeyukyeba kwopusikaru namo
ube kwona pa wanu ni kwopu namo tatwo tuku no nuganapyeyukyedo wanu ga yunopyeba
adumadi no tegwonoywobisaka kwoyete inaba are pa kwopwimu na noti pa apinu to
toposi to pu kwona no sirane ni apo sida mo apanopye sida mo na ni koso yosare
akamiyama kusane karisoke apasu ga pe araswopu imo si ayani kanasi mo
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi kanasi imo ga tamakura panare ywodati kinwo kamo
arikinuno sawesawe sidumi ipye no imo ni monoipazu kinite omopigurusi mo
karakoromo suswo no utikape apanedomo kyesiki kokoro wo a ga mopanaku ni
karakoromo suswo no utikapi apanapyeba nenapye no karani kototakaritu mo
piru tokyeba tokyenapye pimo no wa ga sena ni apiyoru kamo yworu tokyeyasukye
asawora wo wokye ni pususani umasu tomo asu ki sesame ya iza se wodoko ni
turukitati mwi ni swopu imo wo torimi gane ne wo so nakituru tegwo ni aranaku ni
kanasi imo wo yuduka nabe maki mokorowo no koto to si ipaba iya katamasi ni
adusayumi suwe ni tama maki kaku susu so nenana narinisi oku wo kanukanu
opu simoto ko no motoyama no masiba ni mo noranu imo ga na kata ni idemu kamo
adusayumi ywora no yamapye no sigyekaku ni imoro wo tatete sanedwo parapu mo
adusayumi suwe pa yorinemu masaka koso pitome wo opomi na wo pasi ni okyere

sentence.transcription: na wo pasi ni ok yere

block.header: yanagwi koso kireba paye sure yo no pito no kwopwi ni sinamu wo ikani seyo to so
woyamada no ike no tutumi ni sasu yanagwi nari mo narazu mo na to putari pa mo

sentence.transcription: na to puta ri pa mo

block.header: osopaya mo na wo koso matame mukatuwo no sipi no kwoyade no api pa tagapazi
osopaya mo kimi wo si matamu mukatuwo no sipi no sayeda no toki pa sugu tomo
kwomotiyama wakakapyerute no momitu made nemo to wa pa mopu na pa ado ka mopu

sentence.transcription: ne mo to wa pa mopu

block.header: ipaporo no swopi no wakamatu kagiri to ya kimi ga kimasanu uramotonaku mo
tatibana no kwoba no panari ga omopu namu kokoro utukusi ide are pa ikana
kapakami no nezirwotakagaya ayani ayani sane sanete koso koto n idenisika
unapara no neyaparakwosuge amata areba kimi pa wasurasu ware wasurure ya
woka ni yose wa ga karu kaya no sanekaya no makoto nagoya pa nero to pyena kamo
murasaki pa ne wo ka mo wopuru pito no kwo no uraganasikye wo ne wo wopenaku ni
apaworo no worota ni oparu tapamidura pikaba nurunuru a wo koto na taye

sentence.transcription: wo ro ta ni op aru

block.header: wa ga meduma pito pa sakuredo asagapo no tosi sape kogoto wa pa sakaru gape
azekagata sipopwi no yutani omopyeraba ukyera ga pana no iro n ideme ya mo

sentence.transcription: iro n ide me ya mo

block.header: parubye saku pudi no uraba no ura yasuni sanuru ywo so naki kworo wo si mopeba

sentence.transcription: sa nuru ywo so na ki

block.header: utipisasu miya no sekapa no kapobana no kwopwite ka nu ramu kiso mo koyopi mo
nipimurwo no kodoki ni itareba padasusuki po n idesi kimi ga miyenu ko no koro

sentence.transcription: po n ide si kimi ga
mi ye nu ko no koro

block.header: tani sebami mine ni papitaru tamakadura tayemu no kokoro wa ga mopanaku ni
sibatuki no miurasaki n aru netukwogusa apimizu araba are kwopwime ya mo
takubusuma sirayamakaze no nenapyedomo kworo ga osoki no arwo koso yesi mo
miswora yuku kumo ni moga mo na kyepu yukite imo ni kotodopi asu kapyerikomu
awonero ni tanabiku kumo no isaywopi ni mono wo so omopu tosi no ko no koro
pitonero ni iparu mono kara awonero ni isaywopu kumo no yosorituma pa mo
yupu sareba miyama wo saranu ninwogumo no aze ka tayemu to ipisi kworo pa mo

sentence.transcription: ipi si kwo ro pa mo

block.header: takaki ne ni kumo no tuku nosu ware sapeni kimi ni tukinana takane to mopite
a ga omo no wasuremu sida pa kuni papuri ne ni tatu kumo wo mitutu sinwopase
tusima no ne pa sitagumo aranapu kamunone ni tanabiku kumo wo mitutu sinwopamo
sirakumono tayenisi imo wo aze sero to kokoro ni norite kokoba kanasikye
ipa no pe ni ikagaru kumo no kanwomaduku pito so otapapu iza nesime twora
na ga papa ni korare a pa yuku awokumono ideko wagimokwo apimite yukamu
omokata no wasuremu sida pa oponworo ni tanabiku kumo wo mitutu sinwopamu
karasu to pu opowosodori no masadeni mo kimasanu kimi wo koroku to so naku
kiso koso pa kworo to sanesika kumo no upe yu nakiyuku tadu no matopoku omopoyu

sentence.transcription: kwo ro to sa ne sika

block.header: saka kwoyete abe no tanomo ni wiru tadu no tomosiki kimi pa asu sape moga mo

sentence.transcription: abe no ta no mo ni

block.header: mawogomo no pu no ma tikakute apanapyeba oki tu makamo no nageki so a ga suru
mikukunwo ni kamo no papo nosu kworo ga upe ni kotoworo papete imada nenapu mo
numa putatu kaywopa tori ga su a ga kokoro putayuku namo to na yomopari sone
oki ni sumo wokamo no mokoro yasakadori ikiduku imo wo okite kinwo kamo
midutorino tatamu yosopi ni imonora ni monoipazu kinite omopikanetu mo
toya no nwo ni wosagi nerapari wosawosa mo nenapye kwo yuweni papa ni koropaye
sawosika no pusu ya kusamura miyezu tomo kworo ga kanatwo ywo yukaku si yesi mo

sentence.transcription: kwo ro ga kana two ywo

block.header: imo wo koso apimi ni kosika maywobikino yokoyamapyero no sisi nasu omopyeru
paru no nwo ni kusa pamu kwoma no kuti yamazu a wo sinwopu ramu ipye no kworo pa mo

sentence.transcription: ipye no kwo ro pa mo

block.header: pito no kwo no kanasikye sida pa pamasudori anayumu kwoma no wosikyeku mo nasi
akagwoma ga kadwode wo situtu idekateni sesi wo mitatesi ipye no kwora pa mo

sentence.transcription: se si wo mi tate si
ipye no kwo ra pa mo

block.header: ono ga wo wo oponi na omopi so nipa ni tati wemasu ga kara ni kwoma ni apu monowo
akagwoma wo utite sawobiki kokorobiki ikanaru sena ka wagari komu to ipu

sentence.transcription: wa gari ko mu to ipu

block.header: kupyegwosi ni mugi pamu kwouma no patupatuni apimisi kwora si ayani kanasi mo

sentence.transcription: api mi si kwo ra si

block.header: umasegwosi mugi pamu kwoma no patupatuni nipipada puresi kworo si kanasi mo
piropasi wo uma kwosiganete kokoro nomwi imogari yarite wa pa koko ni site
wopayasi ni kwoma wo pasasake kokoro nomwi imogari yarite wa pa koko ni site
azu no upye ni kwoma wo tunakite ayapokato pitodumakworo wo iki ni wa ga suru
sawatari no tegwo ni iyukiapi akagwoma ga agaki wo payami koto topazu kinu
azupe kara kwoma no yukwo nosu ayapa twomo pitodumakworo wo mayukaserapumo
sazareisi ni kwoma wo pasasete kokoro itami a ga mopu imo ga ipye no atari kamo
murwogaya no turu no tutumi no narinu gani kworo pa ipyedomo imada nenaku ni
asukagapa sita nigoreru wo sirazusite senana to putari sanete kuyasi mo

sentence.transcription: se na na to puta ri

block.header: asukakapa seku to siriseba amataywo mo winete komasi wo seku to siriseba
awoyagwi no pararwo kapatwo ni na wo matu to semidwo pa kumazu tatidwo narasu mo
adi no sumu susa no iriye no komorinu no ana ikidukasi mizu pisanisite
naru sero ni kotu no yosu nasu itonokite kanasikye sero ni pito sapye yosu mo
tayupigata sipo mitiwataru idu yu ka mo kanasiki sero ga wagari kaywopamu
ositeinato ine pa tukanedo naminopono itaburasi mo yo kiso pitori nete
adikama no kata ni saku nami pirase ni mo pimo toku mono ka kanasikye wo okite
matu ga ura ni sawawe uradati mapitogoto omoposu namo ro wa ga mopo nosu mo
adikama no kakye no minatwo ni iru sipo no kotetazuku mo ka irete nemaku mo

sentence.transcription: kakye no mi na two ni

block.header: imo ga nuru toko no atari ni ipagukuru midu ni moga mo yo irite nemaku mo

sentence.transcription: mi du ni moga mo yo

block.header: makuraga no koga no watari no karakadi no otodakasi mo na nenapye kwo yuweni
sipobune no okareba kanasi sanetureba pitogoto sikyesi na wo do ka mo simu

sentence.transcription: na wo do ka mo si mu

block.header: nayamasikye pitoduma kamo yo kogu pune no wasure pa senana iya mopimasu ni
apazusite yukaba wosikyemu makuraga no koga kogu pune ni kimi mo apanu kamo
opobune wo pe yu mo tomo yu mo katametesi koso no satwobito arapasame kamo

sentence.transcription: pe yu mo tomo yu mo

block.header: makane puku nipu no masopo no iro n idete ipanaku nomwi so a ga kwopuraku pa
kanatwoda wo aragakima yu mi pi ga tworeba ame wo matwo nosu kimi wo to matwo mo
ariswo ya ni opuru tamamo no utinabiki pitori ya nu ramu a wo matikanete
pitagata no iswo no wakame no tatimidaye wa wo ka matu namo kiso mo koyopi mo
kwosugero no ura puku kaze no ado susu ka kanasikye kworo wo omopisugwosamu
ka no kworo to nezu ya narinamu padasusuki uranwo no yama ni tuku katayoru mo

sentence.transcription: ne zu ya nari na mu

block.header: wagimokwo ni a ga kwopwisinaba sowapye kamo kamwi ni oposemu kokoro sirazute
okite ikaba imo pa makanasi motite yuku adusa no yumi no yutuka ni moga mo
okurewite kwopwiba kurusi mo asagari no kimi ga yumi ni mo naramasi monowo
sakimori ni tatisi asake no kanatwode ni tabanare wosimi nakisi kwora pa mo

sentence.transcription: naki si kwo ra pa mo

block.header: asi no pa ni yupugwiri tatite kamo ga ne no samuki yupupye si na woba sinwopamu
onoduma wo pito no satwo ni oki opoposiku mitutu so kinuru ko no miti no apida
ado mopye ka azikumayama no yudurupa no pupumaru toki ni kaze pukazu kamo
asipikwino yamakadurakage masibani mo egataki kage wo oki ya karasamu
wosatwo n aru panatatibana wo pikiyodite woramu to suredo urawakami koso
miyaziro no su ka pye ni tateru kapo ga pana na sakiide sone komete sinwopamu

sentence.transcription: su ka pye ni tat eru

block.header: napasiro no kwonagwi ga pana wo kinu ni suri naruru manima ni aze ka kanasikye
kanasi imo wo iduti yukame to yamasugeno sogapi ni nesiku ima si kuyasi mo
